subject: Warranty follow-up needs service recovery
summary: Customer is waiting on a warranty response. Hermes found the likely case type and prepared a careful evidence/service-recovery draft.
source_snippet: Fixture email: customer says they already tried the basic checks and wants to know what happens next. Name, email, order, address, and model serial removed.
draft_reply: Hi there, thanks for your patience here. I do not want to guess and send you in circles. Could you send a short video of the issue plus a photo of the serial/model sticker? Once I have that, I can confirm whether we should do a repair intake, parts path, or replacement/refurb option.
owner_gate: Phu approves whether this goes as an evidence request, service-recovery reply, or bench/intake path.
business_impact: Prevents an overdue warranty case from becoming an angry customer or wrong replacement promise.

subject: Bidet fit question before purchase
summary: Warm lead needs product-fit confidence. Hermes drafted a Phil-style answer that avoids overpromising compatibility.
source_snippet: Fixture email: customer asks if a warm-water bidet will fit a skirted toilet and whether a lower-risk option exists. Contact data removed.
draft_reply: Hey, good question. I would rather be a little careful here than sell you something annoying to install. If you can send a quick photo of the toilet side profile and the bolt area, I can confirm the safest options. Based on what you described, I would lean toward the lower-risk fit first instead of forcing the premium model.
owner_gate: Phu approves final product recommendation and tone before send.
business_impact: Saves a sale while reducing bad-fit returns and support follow-up.

subject: Supplier RMA checklist needs owner choice
summary: Supplier path exists, but customs/contents/label wording require owner review before anything is sent or booked.
source_snippet: Fixture vendor thread: supplier asks for repair/RMA details. No real supplier destination, account number, customer name, or case ID included.
draft_reply: Hi, we can prepare the unit for repair review. Before sending, I need to confirm the exact boxed contents, declared value, and whether the customer or Toiletland is covering the shipping leg. I will send the full details once confirmed.
owner_gate: Phu confirms boxed contents, customs assumptions, and label/no-label decision.
business_impact: Avoids wrong customs/label commitments and supplier confusion.

subject: System notification can be ignored
summary: Low-risk system notice. Hermes would suppress it from the owner queue unless repeated failures appear.
source_snippet: Fixture system email: routine notification with no customer, payment, or fulfillment risk.
draft_reply: No reply needed. Keep quiet unless the same system starts failing or a customer/order dependency appears.
owner_gate: No owner action recommended in demo; keep as proof of noise suppression.
business_impact: Keeps Phu from opening the inbox for false alarms.
